title: erigeron bellidiastrum var. bellidiastrum
intro: Erigeron bellidiastrum var. bellidiastrum, also known as the Dandelion's cousin or the Russian fleabane, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family that is native to Eastern Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erigeron bellidiastrum var. bellidiastrum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its use in reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of the common cold. Erigeron bellidiastrum var. bellidiastrum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
